data.description:
## Why
Multi-backend reconcilers (ticket systems beyond Jira) are planned. Today the Jira/Atlassian assumption is threaded across ~24 reconciler files with no vendor-adapter seam, and the 55-module reconciler is a flat namespace. These are one design problem: the sub-package boundary IS the vendor-adapter seam. (O5 + S5 — verified; combined per maintainer.)

Citations: O5 — Jira coupling across `_engine/rebar_reconciler/` (`acli*`, `adf.py`, `jira_fields.py`, `outbound_fields.py`, differ/apply cluster; `outbound_fields.py` touched 2026-07-06 for one status mapping). S5 — 55 flat `.py` files, no sub-packaging.

## What
DESIGN/ADR FIRST (do this now): author an ADR mapping (a) the Jira-coupled modules, (b) the operations that must become vendor-neutral (issue CRUD, field mapping via outbound_fields/adf, the acli transport), (c) the target sub-package layout separating a backend-neutral core (differs/apply/dispatch/store) from an `adapters/jira/` vendor layer, and (d) the interface a second backend would implement. THEN execute the sub-packaging around that seam, preserving import paths via package `__init__` re-exports. Do NOT build a speculative full adapter abstraction ahead of the ADR — the ADR decides the seam.

## Scope
Reconciler structure + vendor seam. Sequence the code move AFTER the reconciler function-extraction and git-adapter tickets so modules move once. This is the enabler for the future second-backend initiative.

cascade_flag: sub-packaging moves ~55 modules — broad importer + dynamic-reference sweep (module-qualified imports like `acli_subprocess._run_acli`, importlib/string refs).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ADR authored: Jira-coupling inventory + vendor-neutral operation list + target sub-package layout + second-backend interface sketch (design done NOW)
- [ ] Reconciler grouped into topical sub-packages with a backend-neutral core vs adapters/jira/ vendor layer
- [ ] Import paths preserved via package re-exports (module-qualified imports still resolve)
- [ ] Adding a second backend is documented as "implement adapters/<name>/ against the seam"
data.title: Reconciler vendor-adapter seam: ADR + sub-packaging for multi-backend (O5+S5)
